decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to utilize a combination of counter spells, card draw, and powerful creatures to quickly build up a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with a combo finish. By using cards like Disrupting Shoal, Whir of Invention, and Hydroelectric Specimen, the deck aims to control the game through disruption and tempo plays. The inclusion of cards like Lotus Bloom and Sea Gate Restoration help generate mana and card advantage, while Goblin Charbelcher serves as the primary win condition for the deck. Overall, the strategy revolves around setting up a powerful combo finish while maintaining control of the game.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan by controlling the board through removal spells and land destruction. It aims to slow down the opponent's tempo and regain advantage with powerful creatures like White Orchid Phantom and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury. The deck also utilizes cards like Price of Freedom and Solitude to protect key creatures and maintain control of the battlefield. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent by dismantling their resources and overwhelming them with powerful threats.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures like Territorial Kavu and Scion of Draco, supported by efficient removal like Lightning Bolt. The deck also includes Leyline of the Guildpact to boost the power of multicolored creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury. Stubborn Denial provides protection for your threats, while Consign to Memory offers some control over the opponent's board. With a mix of creatures, removal, and synergy cards, this deck aims to maintain pressure and control the game from the start.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana using Eldrazi Temple and other lands to play powerful creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Springheart Nantuko. It also includes disruption with cards like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble to control the opponent's board. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and efficient creatures, while also having some utility lands like Ghost Quarter and Blast Zone for additional control options. Overall, the strategy revolves around fast mana acceleration and aggressive creature plays in order to dominate the game.

The deck focuses on aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent and control the board. It includes powerful creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, along with instant removal spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm. The deck also uses Ajani, Nacatl Pariah as a versatile planeswalker to buff creatures and gain life. Additionally, it includes disruptive elements like Goblin Bombardment and Blood Moon to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Overall, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and finish the game quickly.

The main idea of this Dimir Control deck is to utilize a combination of counterspells, hand disruption, and removal spells to control the game and out-value the opponent. The deck includes a mix of traditional control elements like Counterspell and Thoughtseize, along with newer cards like Subtlety and Force of Negation. The win condition is to slowly grind out the opponent with efficient removal and disruptive creatures like Orcish Bowmasters and Psychic Frog, while also utilizing powerful finishers like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Quantum Riddler to secure victory.

This deck focuses on combining aggressive creature play with the ability to temporarily exile and return them to the battlefield for additional value. By using cards like Flickerwisp and Ephemerate, along with creatures like Solitude and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, the deck can disrupt opponents' strategies and maintain board presence. Thoughtseize and Teferi, Time Raveler provide disruption and control elements, while the blink effects ensure that the deck can continually pressure opponents and outvalue them in the mid to late game. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently.

The deck focuses on creating a fast and aggressive board presence by utilizing artifacts and creature synergies. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with early threats like Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer, supported by powerful artifacts such as Mishra's Bauble and Mox Opal. The deck also includes disruption tools like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt to control the game and protect its key pieces. Emry, Lurker of the Loch is used to recur artifacts from the graveyard, while Urza's Saga provides additional value and threat generation. Strong tempo plays and efficient removal round out the strategy.

This deck aims to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. By using cards like Narset, Parter of Veils and Mystic Gate, the deck can limit the opponent's options while drawing into key pieces. Solitude and Wrath of the Skies provide removal for threats on the board, while Teferi, Time Raveler helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes alternative win conditions like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Timeless Dragon to close out games if needed. Overall, the deck focuses on outlasting the opponent and winning through attrition.

The deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures like Griselbrand using cards like Goryo's Vengeance. It also utilizes instant speed interaction and card draw to protect the combo and disrupt opponent's strategies. A key part of the deck is the use of cards like Quantum Riddler and Atraxa, Grand Unifier to generate advantage and control the game. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces while disrupting the opponent's gameplan, allowing it to win through efficient and powerful plays.

The deck focuses on using instant speed reanimation spells and combo pieces to bring powerful creatures like Griselbrand into play quickly. By combining cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Solitude with Ephemerate and Faithful Mending for card advantage and protection, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up its own win condition. Utilizing powerful creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Quantum Riddler, the deck aims to control the game and overwhelm the opponent with a combination of combos and efficient spells.

The main focus of this UW Control deck is to heavily disrupt the opponent's game plan through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and powerful planeswalkers like Narset and Teferi. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Solitude and Wrath of the Skies while also using Orim's Chant and Force of Negation to protect its key pieces. The deck also includes card draw and filtering effects to ensure consistency and card advantage. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to outlast the opponent and win through attrition and incremental advantage.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up your graveyard with cards like Burning Inquiry, Faithless Looting, and Mishra's Bauble to enable the free casting of powerful threats like Hollow One and Nethergoyf. Dragon's Rage Channeler and Detective's Phoenix provide consistent damage output, while Lightning Bolt and Unholy Heat offer removal options. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, utilizing the graveyard as a resource to gain advantage and close out the game quickly.

The deck focuses on winning the game through a combo involving Goblin Charbelcher, Lotus Bloom, and Hydroelectric Specimen. By quickly cycling through the deck using cards like Preordain and Sea Gate Restoration, the player can assemble the combo pieces and deal massive damage to the opponent. The deck also includes various counterspells and disruptive spells like Disrupting Shoal and Jwari Disruption to protect the combo and control the game. With a focus on speed and efficiency, the deck aims to outpace and overwhelm the opponent before they can set up their own game plan.

The deck focuses on quickly getting creatures on the battlefield and dealing damage to the opponent as fast as possible. It utilizes cheap and efficient spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to control the board and clear the way for aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler. The deck also includes card draw and scrying effects to ensure a consistent stream of threats. By putting pressure on the opponent early and maintaining tempo throughout the game, it aims to quickly close out matches before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck aims to quickly generate mana using rituals and medallions, while utilizing cards like Reckless Impulse and Ral, Monsoon Mage to draw through the deck. The combo involves casting Glimpse the Impossible or Artist's Talent to generate a large storm count, finishing with a Grapeshot for lethal damage. The deck also includes cards like Valakut Awakening and Wish for deck manipulation and flexibility. This deck focuses on explosive turns and quickly assembling the combo to overwhelm the opponent.
